section_rules.Purpose and Business Outcome: Reference business case; do not repeat full business case argument.
section_rules.Scope: Separate in scope and out of scope.
section_rules.Deliverables: List authorized project deliverables, not desired business outcomes.
section_rules.Success Measures: Prefer outcome and operational measures over activity measures.
section_rules.Governance and Change Control: Include cadence, decision thresholds, escalation path, and change-control method.
